title: CCO competition PR payload
description: The single fenced JSON block a miner includes in their PR body. ONLY this payload (plus the acknowledgement checkboxes and the body hash) carries authority — all other prose in the PR is non-authoritative decoration.

commit_sha.description: Full 40-hex PR HEAD commit SHA. Also the source of the per-rerun input seed.

kernel_type.description: The track this submission competes on. Must equal kernel.py's KERNEL_TYPE; the PR is scored against champions/<kernel_type>/kernel.py.

kernel_sha256.description: sha256 of the submitted kernel.py bytes. Binds the artifact into the canonical rerun.

hotkey.description: SN74 SS58 hotkey address, bound to the miner's GitHub identity (Gate 1).

signature.description: sr25519/ed25519 signature by the hotkey over the canonical message `${commit_sha}:${kernel_sha256}:${kernel_type}`.

claimed_speedup.description: Optional, advisory self-reported speedup vs the champion. NEVER trusted — the canonical rerun is authoritative. Used only for cheap Gate-3 triage.
